---
name: Problem Submission
about: Submit an accessibility problem for the CoP to solve
title: "[Problem] "
labels: problem
assignees: ''
---

## Context

What project or situation triggered this problem?

<!-- Describe the project, client context, or scenario where this accessibility challenge came up. Include relevant constraints like timeline, tech stack, or team structure. -->

## What I've Tried

What approaches have you attempted, and why didn't they work?

<!-- List the solutions you've already explored. Explain what blocked each approach or why it fell short. This helps the CoP avoid suggesting things you've already ruled out. -->

## Help Needed

What specific guidance, decisions, or expertise do you need from the CoP?

<!-- Be specific about what kind of help would unblock you. Examples:
- "Need a standardized template for X so I don't reinvent it each time"
- "Need guidance on whether approach A or B is better for this scenario"
- "Need someone with experience in X to pair with me on this problem"
- "Need to validate my understanding of WCAG criterion Y"
-->

## Desired Outcome

What does "solved" look like?

<!-- Describe what success means. What will you be able to do after the CoP session that you can't do now? What artifact, decision, or guidance would make this problem go away? -->

---

**After submission, this issue will be:**
- Labeled by type (technical, governance, workflow, buy-in) and priority
- Considered for upcoming CoP sessions (1-2 problems selected per session)
- Discussed during working sessions or resolved async if straightforward
